creator: truckman@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 193980
patch to unbreak wkhtmltopdf build with clang 6.0

wkhtmltopdf fails to build with clang 6.0 and is marked BROKEN.  The attached patch adds
  USE_CXXSTD=	gnu++98
to the Makefile which switches clang back to the C++ standard that it used before  version 6.0.  I am able to build wkhtmltopdf with this change.
